documents.topic: Iterative _Tuple rendering — eliminates O(N) stack depth from left-heavy binary nesting in dynamic dispatch path. Partially superseded by worklist-rendering-dispatch.md (tuple solution retained, overall approach replaced).

CSS modifier dispatch ordering — inventories all 46 modifier conformances, all `_pushElement` push-time READs, all `_popElement` / `_popStyle` pop-time CONSUMES; classifies each modifier by phase set; recommends α₂-flat (per-modifier `phase` declaration on `Modifier` protocols) over α₁ (uniform post-push reorder, provably broken).
